name: Calcolatore Area Triangolo
desc: Calcola Area = (base × height) / 2. Esempio: base 8 m, height 5 m = Area = 20 m². Calcolatore gratuito e preciso, senza registrazione.
description: Calcola Area = (base × height) / 2. Esempio: base 8 m, height 5 m = Area = 20 m². Calcolatore gratuito e preciso, senza registrazione.
seo_description: Calcola Area = (base × height) / 2. Esempio: base 8 m, height 5 m = Area = 20 m². Calcolatore gratuito e preciso, senza registrazione.
example_label: Calculate the area of a triangular roof section with 14.5m base and 8.75m height for materiale estimation

range_hints.base: Tepical: 1-100m for construction; ane posetive value
range_hints.altura: Must be perpindicular height; range: 0.5-200m tepical

result_context: The area ({area}) represents the surface of the triangle, calculated as half the product of base and perpendicular height.
mistakes: Using slant height instead of perpendicular height from base to apex
Forgetting to divide by 2 (calculating as rectangle instead)
Not ensuring height is measured at 90° to the base
